falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4200 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern relied on 4800 as structural support; a break below 4200 would represent a -12.5% collapse through that floor, invalidating the consolidation/bottom thesis and confirming a new leg down rather than a tradable low

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom featured VIX peaking near 28 and rapidly mean-reverting; sustained elevation above 35 indicates systemic stress incompatible with a successful bottom formation, proving the pattern match failed

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further below -50bps (more negative) and holds for 5+ days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The referenced bottom occurred with curve steepening as a recovery signal; deepening inversion contradicts the reflation/growth stabilization narrative required for the pattern to resolve bullishly

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
